Footer.compliance: Built on EAS — the same attestation layer as GIWA Dojang.

Landing.title: On-Chain Diplomas
Landing.subtitle: That Can't Be Faked
Landing.description: Dojang Diploma issues academically rigorous and tamper-proof certificates using Ethereum Attestation Service (EAS) directly on GIWA Sepolia Testnet.
Landing.explainerSubtitle: A transparent, decentralized workflow for issuing, receiving, and validating digital credentials.
Landing.step1Desc: Bootcamps and educational organizations mint diplomas as on-chain EAS attestations.
Landing.step2Desc: Students receive diplomas straight in their Web3 wallet, verified forever.
Landing.step3Desc: Anyone can verify authenticity with a public link — no wallet or Web3 connection required.
Landing.giwaDesc: GIWA chain provides the ultimate foundation for verifiable credentials, ensuring your achievements are permanent and secure.
Landing.giwaBullet1Desc: Powered by GIWA Flashblocks offering sub-1s tx finality.
Landing.giwaBullet2Desc: Built on the exact same Ethereum Attestation Service layer as GIWA Dojang.
Landing.giwaBullet3Desc: Verification is read-only and fully public. Zero gas needed to verify.

Issue.connectDesc: You must connect an authorized issuer wallet to mint Dojang diplomas on-chain.
Issue.networkDesc: Dojang Diploma operates on GIWA Sepolia Testnet (Chain ID: 91342).
Issue.networkPrompt: Please switch your active wallet network to proceed.
Issue.title: Issue New Diploma
Issue.desc: Attest a student's completion of a course on the GIWA network.

Batch.title: Batch Issue via CSV
Batch.desc: Upload a CSV file containing multiple students to mint attestations in one transaction.
Batch.uploadDesc: Select or drag and drop your `.csv` file. It must match the template schema exactly.
Batch.successDesc: Successfully minted {count} diploma attestations in a single transaction.
Batch.footerNote: All attestations will use 'GIWA Academy' as the default issuer.

Verify.notFoundDesc: The transaction hash or UID did not match a valid diploma schema.
Verify.notFoundPrompt: Please verify that the URL is correct or that the transaction has completed on-chain.
Verify.offlineDesc: Scan to verify offline (print on paper CV)

MyDiplomas.connectDesc: Connect your recipient wallet to view your issued on-chain Dojang diplomas.
MyDiplomas.syncErrorDesc: Failed to fetch your attestations from the GIWA Sepolia network.
MyDiplomas.emptyDesc: There are no Dojang diploma attestations registered for this wallet address.
MyDiplomas.emptyPrompt: Ask your bootcamp administrator or course instructor to issue an attestation directly to your wallet.
